overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character exploring a dark, foggy forest at night with a flashlight and weapon. The character navigates through dense woods, rocky terrain, and crosses a shallow stream in a tense, atmospheric environment with dynamic lighting from the flashlight and moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path with fallen logs and thick vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through dense forest holding flashlight and shotgun, illuminating the path ahead

entered.detail: large decaying logs blocking parts of the path
dense wall of trees and undergrowth creating enclosure
large rock covered in green moss

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed forest path surrounded by dense vegetation and fallen logs. The flashlight beam cuts through the darkness, revealing mossy rocks and twisted roots along the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest clearing with moonlight filtering through tall pines

events.description: emerging from dense cover, moonlight becomes visible through the tree canopy

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the forest opens up revealing the night sky and moon between the trees

entered.detail: night sky visible through tree canopy with bright moon
tall pine trees silhouetted against the sky

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up into a clearing where moonlight filters through the tall pines, changing the lighting from flashlight-only to mixed moonlight. The path continues through scattered trees with rocky ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest canyon with large boulders and cliff walls

events.description: entering enclosed rocky area with large stone formations and cliff walls

agents.ego_description: navigating through rocky terrain with flashlight illuminating the path ahead between boulders

entered.detail: large stone wall formation covered in moss
scattered large rocks blocking parts of the path
tall rock cliff rising above the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow rocky canyon where large boulders and cliff walls enclose the path. The sky becomes mostly blocked by rock formations, returning the scene to low light conditions illuminated only by the flashlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky stream bed with shallow water

events.description: carefully stepping across the shallow rocky stream

agents.ego_description: crossing the shallow stream and continuing along the forest trail on the other side

entered.detail: shallow water flowing over rocks in the path
rocky river bed with smooth stones

segments.scene_description: The character carefully crosses a shallow rocky stream, with water covering the ground surface. After crossing, the path continues through forest with scattered rocks and vegetation along the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a dark forest that transitions from enclosed woodland into an open clearing and finally through a restrictive rocky canyon. It begins on a narrow dirt trail where a flashlight beam cuts through dense vegetation, mossy rocks, and twisted roots. As the path opens into a clearing, the lighting shifts from the singular beam of the flashlight to a mix of moonlight filtering through tall pines and scattered trees. The scene then tightens as the camera enters a narrow canyon of large boulders and cliff walls that block the sky, returning the environment to low-light conditions. Finally, the movement leads the character across a shallow rocky stream before continuing back into a forest landscape of scattered rocks and vegetation.
